title: Manali Adventure - Snow & Mountains
description: Experience the thrill of Himalayan adventure with snow-capped peaks, pristine valleys, and adrenaline-pumping activities in the heart of Himachal Pradesh.
highlights: Rohtang Pass visit with snow activities
Hadimba Temple and Vashisht Hot Springs

itinerary.title: Arrival & Local Sightseeing
itinerary.description: Arrive at Manali, check-in to hotel. Visit Hadimba Temple, Old Manali, and Mall Road for shopping.

itinerary.title: Solang Valley Adventure
itinerary.description: Full day at Solang Valley with paragliding, zorbing, and ropeway activities.

itinerary.title: Rohtang Pass Excursion
itinerary.description: Early morning trip to Rohtang Pass for snow activities and scenic views.

itinerary.title: River Rafting & Vashisht
itinerary.description: River rafting in Beas River followed by relaxation at Vashisht Hot Springs.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Check-out from hotel and departure to your destination.

title: Goa Beach Paradise - Sun, Sand & Sea
description: Relax on pristine beaches, enjoy water sports, and experience the vibrant nightlife of Goa in this perfect beach getaway.

itinerary.title: Arrival & Beach Time
itinerary.description: Arrive in Goa, check-in to resort. Relax at Baga Beach and enjoy water sports.

itinerary.title: North Goa Exploration
itinerary.description: Visit Calangute Beach, Anjuna Flea Market, and Fort Aguada.

itinerary.title: South Goa & Dudhsagar
itinerary.description: Trip to Dudhsagar Waterfalls and Old Goa churches. Evening sunset cruise.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Last-minute shopping and departure from Goa.

title: Kerala Backwaters - God's Own Country
description: Cruise through serene backwaters, stay in traditional houseboats, and explore the lush green landscapes of Kerala.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Kochi
itinerary.description: Arrive in Kochi, visit Chinese Fishing Nets, Fort Kochi, and Mattancherry Palace.

itinerary.title: Kochi to Munnar
itinerary.description: Drive to Munnar, check-in to hotel. Visit tea plantations and Mattupetty Dam.

itinerary.title: Munnar Sightseeing
itinerary.description: Visit Eravikulam National Park, Echo Point, and Kundala Lake.

itinerary.title: Munnar to Thekkady
itinerary.description: Drive to Thekkady, visit Periyar Wildlife Sanctuary and spice plantations.

itinerary.title: Thekkady to Alleppey
itinerary.description: Drive to Alleppey, board houseboat for backwater cruise.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Check-out from houseboat and departure from Kochi airport.

title: Rajasthan Royal Heritage - Palaces & Forts
description: Explore the royal heritage of Rajasthan with magnificent palaces, historic forts, and vibrant culture.
highlights: Amber Fort and City Palace, Jaipur
City Palace and Lake Pichola, Udaipur

itinerary.title: Arrival in Jaipur
itinerary.description: Arrive in Jaipur, check-in to heritage hotel. Evening visit to local markets.

itinerary.title: Jaipur Sightseeing
itinerary.description: Visit Amber Fort, City Palace, Hawa Mahal, and Jantar Mantar.

itinerary.title: Jaipur to Jodhpur
itinerary.description: Drive to Jodhpur, check-in to hotel. Visit Mehrangarh Fort and Jaswant Thada.

itinerary.title: Jodhpur to Jaisalmer
itinerary.description: Drive to Jaisalmer, check-in to hotel. Evening visit to Jaisalmer Fort.

itinerary.title: Jaisalmer Desert Safari
itinerary.description: Visit Patwon Ki Haveli, Sam Sand Dunes for camel safari and cultural program.

itinerary.title: Jaisalmer to Udaipur
itinerary.description: Drive to Udaipur, check-in to hotel. Evening boat ride on Lake Pichola.

itinerary.title: Udaipur Departure
itinerary.description: Visit Saheliyon Ki Bari, Jagdish Temple. Departure from Udaipur.

title: Shimla Kullu Manali - Hill Station Delight
description: Experience the charm of three beautiful hill stations with scenic landscapes, pleasant weather, and adventure activities.

itinerary.title: Delhi to Shimla
itinerary.description: Overnight journey from Delhi to Shimla by Volvo bus.

itinerary.title: Shimla Arrival & Sightseeing
itinerary.description: Arrive in Shimla, check-in to hotel. Visit Mall Road, Ridge, and Christ Church.

itinerary.title: Shimla to Manali
itinerary.description: Drive to Manali via Kullu Valley. Check-in to hotel in Manali.

itinerary.title: Manali Local Sightseeing
itinerary.description: Visit Hadimba Temple, Vashisht Hot Springs, and Old Manali.

itinerary.title: Rohtang Pass & Solang Valley
itinerary.description: Full day excursion to Rohtang Pass and Solang Valley for adventure activities.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Check-out from hotel and departure to Delhi by Volvo bus.

title: Andaman Islands - Tropical Paradise
description: Discover pristine beaches, crystal clear waters, and vibrant marine life in the beautiful Andaman Islands.
highlights: Cellular Jail light and sound show

itinerary.title: Arrival in Port Blair
itinerary.description: Arrive in Port Blair, check-in to hotel. Visit Cellular Jail and attend light & sound show.

itinerary.title: Ross Island & North Bay
itinerary.description: Visit Ross Island ruins and North Bay for water sports and coral viewing.

itinerary.title: Havelock Island
itinerary.description: Ferry to Havelock Island, visit Radhanagar Beach for sunset.

itinerary.title: Elephant Beach
itinerary.description: Visit Elephant Beach for snorkeling and water sports. Return to Port Blair.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Last-minute shopping and departure from Port Blair.

title: Kashmir Paradise - Heaven on Earth
description: Experience the breathtaking beauty of Kashmir with Dal Lake, Mughal gardens, and snow-capped mountains.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Srinagar
itinerary.description: Arrive in Srinagar, transfer to houseboat on Dal Lake. Evening Shikara ride.

itinerary.title: Srinagar Sightseeing
itinerary.description: Visit Mughal Gardens - Nishat, Shalimar, and Chashme Shahi. Hazratbal Shrine.

itinerary.title: Gulmarg Day Trip
itinerary.description: Full day excursion to Gulmarg. Gondola cable car ride and meadow walks.

itinerary.title: Pahalgam Excursion
itinerary.description: Day trip to Pahalgam valley. Visit Betaab Valley and Aru Valley.

itinerary.title: Sonamarg Day Trip
itinerary.description: Visit Sonamarg - Meadow of Gold. Thajiwas Glacier trek (optional).

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Last-minute shopping at Lal Chowk and departure from Srinagar.

title: Golden Triangle - Delhi Agra Jaipur
description: Explore India's most famous tourist circuit covering Delhi, Agra's Taj Mahal, and Jaipur's royal heritage.
highlights: Red Fort and India Gate, Delhi

itinerary.title: Delhi Sightseeing
itinerary.description: Visit Red Fort, Jama Masjid, India Gate, and Qutub Minar.

itinerary.title: Delhi to Agra
itinerary.description: Drive to Agra, visit Agra Fort and Mehtab Bagh for Taj Mahal sunset view.

itinerary.title: Taj Mahal & Fatehpur Sikri
itinerary.description: Sunrise visit to Taj Mahal, then drive to Fatehpur Sikri. Continue to Jaipur.

itinerary.title: Jaipur Sightseeing
itinerary.description: Visit Amber Fort, City Palace, Hawa Mahal, and Jantar Mantar.

itinerary.title: Jaipur to Delhi
itinerary.description: Morning shopping at local markets, then drive back to Delhi for departure.

title: Kedarnath Yatra - A Spiritual Journey
description: Embark on a divine journey to Kedarnath, one of the most sacred pilgrimage sites in the Himalayas. Experience spiritual bliss amidst majestic peaks and the holy Mandakini river.
highlights: Helicopter ride or trek from Gaurikund

itinerary.title: Haridwar to Guptkashi
itinerary.description: Morning drive to Guptkashi via Rishikesh and Devprayag. Check-in to hotel/camps upon arrival.

itinerary.title: Guptkashi to Kedarnath
itinerary.description: Drive to Gaurikund and start trek to Kedarnath (16km). Attend evening Aarti at the temple.

itinerary.title: Kedarnath to Guptkashi
itinerary.description: Early morning darshan, then trek down to Gaurikund. Drive back to Guptkashi for overnight stay.

itinerary.title: Guptkashi to Haridwar
itinerary.description: Morning drive back to Haridwar. Drop-off at Haridwar Railway Station/Hotel.
